zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Montacute於1211年1月1日出生在英國薩默塞特文卡頓時，他的父親Drew de Montague28歲，母親Alice de Basset31歲。他於1233年與Berthe在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1270年9月23日在匈牙利享年59歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可守爾達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Montacute于1211年1月1日出生在英国薩默塞特文卡頓时，他的父亲Drew de Montague28岁，母亲Alice de Basset31岁。他于1233年与Berthe在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1270年9月23日在匈牙利享年59岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可守爾達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montacute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

The Mongolian Tatars devastated the country. Their presence, which lasted a year, halted development for at least a century. After the warfare with the Hungarians, the Tatars did not continue towards the west.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Montacute was born on 1 January 1211, in Wincanton, Somerset, England, his father, Drew de Montague, was 28 and his mother, Alice de Basset, was 31. He married Berthe in 1233, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 September 1270, in Hungary, at the age of 59, and was buried in Shouldham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Montacute est né le 1 janvier 1211, à Wincanton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Drew de Montague, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice de Basset, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Berthe en 1233, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1270, à Hongrie, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Shouldham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Montacute am 1. Januar 1211 in Wincanton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Drew de Montague 28 und seine Mutter Alice de Basset 31. Er hat 1233 in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England Berthe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. September 1270 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Ungarn und wurde in Shouldham, Norfolk, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Montacuteが1211年1月1日にイギリスソメルセトウィンカントンで生まれた時，父Drew de Montagueは28歳，母Alice de Bassetは31歳であった。1233年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーでBertheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1270年9月23日にハンガリーで59歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクショウルドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Montacute(이)가 1211년 1월 1일 영국 서머세트 윈캔턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Drew de Montague(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Basset(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1233년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 Berthe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 9월 23일 헝가리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 쇼우드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Montacute nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1211, em Wincanton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Drew de Montague, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Basset, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Berthe em 1233, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1270, em Hungria, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Shouldham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Montacute родился 1 января 1211 г. в местности винкантон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Drew de Montague было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Basset, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Berthe в 1233 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 сентября 1270 г. в местности Венгрия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности шоулдхам, норфолк, Англия.
